item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Trump Lifts Naval Blockade on Iran Without Signed Deal
item.description: President Trump announced lifting the naval blockade on Iran without a formal signed agreement, while Iranian media disputes the claims. The reasons for lifting the blockade remain unclear.

item.title: 🇨🇳⚠️ China Building Launch Pads Near Nuclear Missile Silos
item.description: Satellite imagery reveals China constructing a sprawling network of military sites near its nuclear silos, raising concerns about expanded strategic capabilities.

item.title: 🇷🇺💀 Nearly 500,000 Russian Soldiers Killed in Ukraine, Top UK Intel Chief Says
item.description: A senior British intelligence official provided a stark casualty figure, hardening the consensus that Russia is on its heels for the first time since the 2022 invasion.

item.title: 🇨🇳🤖 Chinese Scientists Create AI Algorithm for Autonomous Drone Swarms
item.description: New Smart Web system enables drone swarms to identify friend, foe, and terrain independently, allowing coordinated attacks even when communications are jammed.

item.title: 🇪🇪🛡️ Estonia Deploys Drone Detection Systems on Russian Border
item.description: First stationary anti-drone systems installed along the Estonia-Russia border, marking a significant upgrade to Baltic NATO defenses.

item.title: 🇷🇴🇷🇺 Russian Drone Strikes Residential Building in NATO Member Romania
item.description: A Russian drone hit an apartment block in eastern Romania, causing a fire and injuring two people. The incident marks a significant escalation as Russia directly affects NATO territory amid ongoing Ukraine conflict.

item.title: 🇨🇴🗳️ Colombia Heads to Polls in Presidential Election Shadowed by Political Violence
item.description: Colombians vote Sunday in a presidential contest between left and right candidates, with security concerns and decades-long armed conflict dominating the political agenda.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇬🇧🇦🇺 US UK Australia Sign Underwater Drone Technology Deal Under AUKUS Pact
item.description: The three nations agreed to develop underwater drone technology aimed at protecting undersea cables and boosting naval defense capabilities in the Indo-Pacific region.

item.title: 🚢💥 US Strikes Commercial Ship Attempting to Breach Blockade and Reach Iran
item.description: The United States military struck a commercial vessel that was trying to breach the naval blockade and reach Iran, according to AP News.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇱🇧 Israeli Forces Reach Nabatieh One of Southern Lebanons Largest Cities
item.description: Israeli military has advanced beyond Lebanons Litani River for the first time since 2006, reaching one of southern Lebanons largest cities amid ongoing ceasefire tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukrainian drones strike Russian oil refinery and port
item.description: Ukrainian drone strikes hit Russia's oil infrastructure overnight, damaging a tanker and an oil refinery in Taganrog and striking an oil depot in Armavir, regional officials said.

item.title: ☢️ Russia claims Ukrainian drone struck Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant
item.description: Russia's state nuclear-energy company Rosatom said a Ukrainian drone left a hole in the wall of a turbine hall at the Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant. Ukraine denied the claim.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Pentagon chief urges allies to boost defense spending over China alarm
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth urged allies to increase defense spending to counter China's growing dominance in the region during the Shangri-La Dialogue in Singapore.

item.title: 🇮🇳 India warns inflation may rise from Middle East conflict and weak monsoon
item.description: India's finance ministry warned that retail inflation could accelerate due to fuel price hikes and weaker-than-normal monsoon rains as energy supply disruptions continue from the Middle East conflict.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Delegates ask "Where is China?" at Asian defense forum
item.description: Chinese Defense Minister Dong Jun skipped the Shangri-La Dialogue again this year. Beijing sent a low-profile delegation of PLA "experts and scholars" instead.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia Destroys Sumy Train Station, Kills 5 in Ukraine-Wide Strikes
item.description: Russian forces destroyed a civilian train station in Shostka, Sumy Oblast with kamikaze drones and launched 290 drones plus missiles across Ukraine, killing 5 and injuring 40. The station served hundreds of residents daily before being targeted.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan PM Vows Breakthrough on North Korea Abduction Issue
item.description: Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi pledged to resolve the decades-old abduction issue with North Korea, including considering summit talks. Japan lists 17 citizens abducted in the 1970s-80s, with only 5 returned in 2002.

item.title: 🌡️ Record-Breaking Heatwave Hits Europe, Multiple Deaths Reported
item.description: France, Britain and Portugal all recorded their hottest May days ever, with temperatures exceeding 37°C in parts of France. Several heat-related deaths reported across northern Europe as storms approach to break the heat.

item.title: 🚢💥 US Disables Ship in Gulf During Iran Blockade
item.description: The US military struck a commercial ship attempting to breach the blockade and reach Iran with a Hellfire missile. The incident highlights continued tensions in the Gulf despite ongoing ceasefire negotiations between Washington and Tehran.

item.title: 🇺🇸🌏 Hegseth Addresses Shangri-La Dialogue on US Foreign Policy
item.description: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth outlined Americas geopolitical goals at the Shangri-La Dialogue in Singapore, addressing defense leaders amid questions about US commitment to Asian allies and ongoing global conflicts.

item.title: 🇫🇷🇰🇪 Macron Faces Backlash After Interrupting Africa Summit Panel
item.description: French President Emmanuel Macron faced criticism after he stormed the stage at the Africa Forward Summit in Kenya to demand silence from the audience. The incident comes as France attempts to reshape its relationship with African nations as a partnership of equals rather than a former colonial power.

item.title: 🇦🇲🇷🇺 Russia Recalls Ambassador to Armenia Over EU Rapprochement
item.description: Moscow recalled its envoy to Yerevan for consultations in protest of Armenia's deepening ties with the European Union ahead of a June 7 election, signaling growing tensions in Russia's traditional sphere of influence.

item.title: 🇲🇲🇮🇳 Myanmar Junta Chief Makes First Foreign Visit to India
item.description: Min Aung Hlaing, who recently transitioned from junta chief to president, is visiting India in his first overseas trip since taking the civilian role, seeking regional legitimacy while continuing a brutal civil war.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel Added to UN Sexual Violence Blacklist for First Time
item.description: The United Nations has added Israel to its blacklist of parties responsible for sexual violence in conflict zones, marking an unprecedented diplomatic blow for the country amid ongoing international scrutiny of its military operations.

item.title: 🇨🇩 Ebola Cases Nearly Double in DR Congo as WHO Chief Visits Outbreak Epicenter
item.description: The WHO Director-General arrived in Bunia as confirmed Ebola cases doubled within days, with the outbreak spreading amid insecurity and distrust. Aid cuts are hampering response efforts in the conflict-affected region.
